channel.title: Saurabh Jain
channel.description: Security engineer writing about cloud security, bug bounties, AWS, and the grey areas no one puts on a slide deck.

item.title: BountyHunter Walkthrough: HackTheBox Writeup
item.description: BountyHunter is a beginner Linux machine on HackTheBox. This walkthrough covers nmap recon, exploiting an XXE vulnerability in a bug report form to read local files, and privilege escalation via a Python sudo script.
